a: Go to the Invite page and click 'Invite'. Grant the recommended permissions when prompted.
Spotify, YouTube, Apple Music, and SoundCloud are supported out of the box.
Yes, Swelly is free to use. Premium unlocks higher quality, more filters, and priority features.

Network conditions can vary by region. Try switching voice regions, lowering filters, or checking server latency. If it persists, contact support.
